title: Download/install/uninstall system refactor - installStore SOT + engine adapters + reconciler
description: Kill the 5 root diseases (multi-SOT no reconciliation, local/remote twin drift, refCount lie, unreliable event delivery, fragmented progress math) with a single backend installStore state machine, engine adapters, disk-truth reconciler, snapshot SSE protocol, frontend mirror, unified uninstall. Pod-side wrapper fixes (hot-store evict, pipPins) IN scope. Investigation dossiers in research/.
